items.raw_excerpt: A large school of fish swarms near the surface of the water beneath an angler's fishing line at Saikazaki harbor in Wakayama City, Wakayama Prefecture. The coastal waters surrounding the port are known for a rich marine ecosystem that supports both local recreational angling and a thriving commercial fisheries industry,…
items.summary_en: A large school of fish gathered near the surface below an angler's line at Saikazaki harbor in Wakayama City. The scene highlights the rich coastal waters around the port, where recreational fishing and commercial fisheries both thrive.

items.raw_excerpt: Less than two hours from Brussels, Western City immerses visitors in an authentic atmosphere worthy of the American Wild West.
items.summary_en: Western City, an American Wild West-themed village less than two hours from Brussels, is preparing to welcome visitors again. The attraction features a saloon, gold mine, themed rooms, and an immersive frontier atmosphere.
items.title_en: Immersive Wild West Village Near Brussels Set to Reopen
items.title_original: Just 1 hour and 15 minutes from Brussels, this immersive Western village is set to reopen soon. A saloon, gold mine, themed rooms, and a Wild West atmosphere await! - Bruxelles Secrète

items.title_en: A Cyprus Village Salad à la Brussels
items.title_original: A Cyprus village salad à la Brussels (no travel required) - Kathimerini.com.cy

items.raw_excerpt: Archaeologists have uncovered the largest Roman bathhouse complex ever found in the Netherlands, during excavations in the Waalfront district of Nijmegen. The dig, carried out by the archaeology firms RAAP and BAAC on a former industrial site, also turned up housing blocks, streets, luxury townhouses, a tower and tens of thousands of objects, Nijmegen council said. The baths stood in Ulpia Noviomagus, the Roman city on the site of present-day Nijmegen. The site is at least 4,900 square metres –.
items.summary_en: Archaeologists excavating the Waalfront district of Nijmegen have found the largest Roman bathhouse complex ever discovered in the Netherlands. The former industrial site also revealed streets, housing blocks, luxury townhouses, a tower, and tens of thousands of objects from Ulpia Noviomagus.
items.title_en: Archaeologists uncover the Netherlands' largest Roman bathhouse
items.title_original: Archaeologists uncover the Netherlands’ largest Roman bathhouse

items.raw_excerpt: Everyday commerce is beginning to fray as financial institutions shift focus to digital services across rural Canada
items.summary_en: A small town in Ontario is worried about the local impact of losing its last remaining bank branch. The closure reflects a broader shift toward digital banking that is straining everyday commerce in rural Canada.
items.title_en: A small Ontario town fears collapse as its last bank branch closes
items.title_original: A small Ontario town fears collapse as its last bank branch closes - The Globe and Mail

items.raw_excerpt: This Swedish village is located by the largest inland lake in the country and offers stunning views, nature retreats, lovely cafes, a blues festival, and more.

items.raw_excerpt: A estação pluviométrica do Sistema Alerta Rio na região anotou, das 12h de segunda-feira (15) até a tarde desta terça-feira (16), 254,6 milímetros (mm) de chuva. Tal volume é 146,1 mm superior à média para junho (108,5 mm).
items.summary_en: A rain gauge from Rio's alert system recorded 254.6 mm of rain in Rocinha from midday Monday to Tuesday afternoon. That was 146.1 mm above the area's June average of 108.5 mm.
items.title_en: Rain in Rocinha was more than twice the June average
items.title_original: Chuva na Rocinha superou em mais que duas vezes a média de junho

items.raw_excerpt: Alkmaar is famous among tourists for its cheese market – a re-enactment of how cheese used to be assessed and sold – which is staged every summer season for foreign visitors. But it would be wrong to dismiss Alkmaar because of that. The city has a charming old centre, is close to the dunes and the seaside, and has plenty as a base to keep a weekend or mid-week visitor happy. The earliest written mention of Alkmaar dates back to...
items.summary_en: Alkmaar is known for its tourist cheese market, but the Dutch city also has a charming historic center and easy access to dunes and the seaside. The excerpt presents it as a pleasant base for a weekend or mid-week visit beyond its famous cheese tradition.
items.title_en: Dutch Destinations: Alkmaar Has More Than Cheese
items.title_original: Dutch destinations: there is more to Alkmaar than cheese

items.raw_excerpt: When Swedes talk about celebrating midsommar, they mean Midsummer's Eve, which this year falls on Friday June 19th. It's not a so-called 'red day', but do you still get the day off?
items.summary_en: The article explains whether people in Sweden normally get time off for Midsummer's Eve. Although it is not an official red day, the question matters because many Swedes treat Midsummer as one of the country's major seasonal celebrations.
items.title_en: Do workers in Sweden get Midsummer's Eve off?
items.title_original: Do I get a day off in Sweden at Midsummer?
